title: MCP Integration Test Cases
description: Test cases for verifying MCP server integration with Claude CLI

discovery.description: Tests that verify MCP server discovery without requiring OpenROAD

tests.name: list_tools
tests.description: Verify all MCP tools are discoverable
tests.prompt: List all MCP tools available from the openroad-mcp server. Just list their names.

tests.name: get_metrics
tests.prompt: Call the get_session_metrics MCP tool and report the result.

tests.name: list_sessions
tests.prompt: Use the list_interactive_sessions MCP tool to show all current sessions.

session.description: Tests that verify interactive session functionality (requires OpenROAD)

setup.ensure_no_test_sessions: Terminate any existing sessions with test- prefix

teardown.cleanup_test_sessions: Terminate all sessions created during tests

tests.name: create_session
tests.prompt_template: Create an OpenROAD interactive session with session_id '{session_id}'. Report the session_id created.

tests.name: execute_simple_command
tests.prompt_template: In session '{session_id}', execute the TCL command 'puts hello' using interactive_openroad.

tests.name: execute_math_command
tests.prompt_template: In session '{session_id}', execute 'expr 2 + 2' and report the result.

tests.name: get_history
tests.prompt_template: Get the command history for session '{session_id}' using get_session_history.

tests.name: inspect_session
tests.prompt_template: Inspect session '{session_id}' using inspect_interactive_session and report its state.

tests.name: list_sessions_after_create
tests.prompt_template: Use list_interactive_sessions to verify session '{session_id}' exists.

tests.name: verify_session_gone
tests.description: Verify session no longer exists after termination
tests.prompt_template: Use list_interactive_sessions to verify session '{session_id}' no longer exists.

tests.name: list_report_images
tests.prompt: Use list_report_images to check for available reports. List platforms and designs if any.

error_handling.description: Tests for error handling and edge cases

tests.name: invalid_session_operation
tests.description: Verify error handling for non-existent session
tests.prompt: Try to inspect a session with ID 'nonexistent-session-xyz' using inspect_interactive_session. Report what happens.

tests.name: terminate_nonexistent_session
tests.description: Verify error handling when terminating non-existent session
tests.prompt: Try to terminate session 'nonexistent-session-xyz' using terminate_interactive_session. Report what happens.
